title: Hard Bristle Crevice Cleaning Brush UK - Long Handle Crevice Brushes - Bathroom Tile Groove Gap Cleaning Brush for Cleaning Home Kitchen Toilet Window Vehicle Faucets Grout Home (3)
features: Quality Material: FOOGWEE hard-bristled crevice cleaning brushes are made of premium quality materials with PET bristles, ensuring a gentle yet effective cleaning experience, optimal durability and longer product life

Compact and Convenient: The handle of the gap cleaning brush has a built-in hanging function, which makes them suitable for storage in the kitchen and bathroom, making them easy to access and keep your home tidy
Precision Cleaning Design: FOOGWEE crevice cleaning brush has a precision-designed fine head with an ergonomic handle that easily removes dust, dirt and debris in tight spaces

Versatile Cleaning Brush: This multifunctional crevice cleaning brush is not just for crevice cleaning; whether it's removing dirt from an interior space or tackling hard-to-reach corners, the FOOGWEE cleaning brush offers a comprehensive cleaning solution for a wide range of applications

Wide Application: The magic cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning crevices and corners such as window tracks, tile countertop grout lines, sink handles, lint on fans, shower brackets, cookers, refrigerator gaskets, between bathroom tubs and backsplashes, and more
